concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: titles and complete available abstracts for all 43 slice records assigned to measurement_error_models; allowed concept labels and canonical names
concept_decisions.rationale: The slice mixes general measurement-error correction methods with distinct self-controlled case-series timing-error models, latent-class/diagnostic-error models, and causal-identification papers built around marginal structural or related estimands. The broad provisional label should be split, retaining the generic correction-method shard under the clearer allowed concept.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: allowed concept labels and canonical names; no slice records assigned to this label
concept_decisions.rationale: Multiple-system estimation is a distinct hidden-population estimand with assumptions about list dependence and interaction structure that should not be collapsed into generic capture-recapture.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: titles and complete available abstracts for all 5 slice records assigned to observation_process_models; allowed concept labels and canonical names
concept_decisions.rationale: The records combine generic informative-observation-process models with epidemic partial-observation/data-assimilation methods and explicit reporting-process models. Those identification targets differ enough to require a split while retaining the hidden-state/detection core.

concept_decisions.retained_canonical_name: Surveillance system design, reporting practice, and measurement frameworks
concept_decisions.labels_compared: surveillance_measurement_designs and the more specific allowed surveillance, causal-policy, forecasting, simulation, spatial, and evidence-synthesis concepts used for reassignment
concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: titles and complete available abstracts for all 102 slice records assigned to surveillance_measurement_designs; allowed concept labels and canonical names
concept_decisions.rationale: This is a residual catch-all containing burden reconstruction, data-validation studies, self-report bias work, pharmacovigilance, policy evaluations, transmission models with under-ascertainment, spatial clustering, and reviews. It must be split across more precise allowed concepts rather than retained as a junk drawer.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: allowed concept labels and canonical names; no slice records assigned to this label
concept_decisions.rationale: Preferential sampling encodes dependence between the observation locations and the latent process and is not interchangeable with ordinary spatial regression or geostatistics.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: allowed concept labels and canonical names; no slice records assigned to this label
concept_decisions.rationale: The conflict is nominal duplication, not a substantive estimand split. The clearer allowed concept explicitly captures reporting-delay adjustment for incidence nowcasting and should retain the lineage.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: allowed concept labels and canonical names; no slice records assigned to this label
concept_decisions.rationale: Calibration/extrapolation from sentinel systems should remain distinct from broader sentinel platform design and implementation evaluation, so the broad provisional label should be split.

concept_decisions.evidence_inspected: allowed concept labels and canonical names; no slice records assigned to this label
concept_decisions.rationale: The provisional label duplicates the system-focused allowed concept; early-warning or anomaly-detection methods can be routed separately when present, so the lineage should merge into the cleaner system concept.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Marginal structural models and inverse-probability weighting
reassignments.rationale: Measurement-error correction is built into an MSM/IPW causal-effect estimator.
Commentary centers on exposure and outcome misclassification correction.
Proposes internal standardization to reduce assay measurement error.
Develops paired-sample integration methods to correct cross-laboratory measurement error.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-controlled case-series models with exposure-timing error
reassignments.rationale: Design paper is specific to case-series models with exposure-onset timing error.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-controlled case-series models with exposure-timing error
reassignments.rationale: Introduces measurement-error case-series models for time-varying exposure onset.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-controlled case-series models with exposure-timing error
reassignments.rationale: Inference paper remains within case-series exposure-timing-error methodology.
Focus is sequential medical-product safety surveillance network design.
Extends longitudinal adjustment methods for baseline and time-varying measurement error.
Quantifies and adjusts inherent measurement error in Legionella culturing.
Uses multiple overimputation for joint missing-data and measurement-error correction.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Marginal structural models and inverse-probability weighting
reassignments.rationale: Method specifically extends marginal structural models for measurement error.
Applies multiple overimputation to missing and mismeasured HIV covariates.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Marginal structural models and inverse-probability weighting
reassignments.rationale: Paper is specifically about correcting time-varying covariate measurement error in MSMs.
Commentary is about the identification limits of the test-negative design.
Estimates assay measurement error near the limit of quantification.
Develops joint longitudinal-competing-risks models with covariate measurement error.
Proposes correction for covariate-dependent measurement error without validation data.
Bayesian pneumonia-etiology estimation integrates imperfect tests through latent measurement structure.
Analytic review motivates integrated latent-variable handling of multiple imperfect tests.
Simulation study quantifies selection bias and gestational-age measurement error.
Uses Bayesian latent class modeling for prevalence under imperfect substance-use measures.
Method paper addresses sequencing and variant-calling measurement error.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance ascertainment, validation, and correction studies
reassignments.rationale: Calibrates EHR surveillance prevalence estimates against external survey data.
Examines exposure misclassification from low-fidelity spatiotemporal rainfall measurements.
Develops Bayesian semiparametric models for error-prone and missing predictors.
General interval-censored survival-model methodology with covariate measurement error.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-report and behavioral measurement bias assessment
reassignments.rationale: Corrects HIV substance-use associations using imperfect self-report and chart measures.
Develops mediation-effect estimation robust to mediator measurement error.
Shows how measurement and dating conventions alter microcephaly case-definition prevalence.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Transmission and burden simulation studies with reporting adjustment
reassignments.rationale: Uses transmission models to study surveillance measurement uncertainty and biological assumptions.
Bayesian latent-class analysis estimates SSI incidence under imperfect surveillance sources.
Latent class analysis explicitly includes a measurement-error class.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance system design, reporting practice, and measurement frameworks
reassignments.rationale: Framework paper is about descriptive-study design and measurement biases.
Validates maternal self-report against medical records for infections and medications.
Quantifies differential metagenome-inference measurement error across community types.
Adjusts complex-sample seroprevalence estimation for imperfect test sensitivity and specificity.
Regional COVID severity analysis treats under-reporting as spatially structured measurement error.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Surveillance ascertainment, validation, and correction studies
reassignments.rationale: Uses auxiliary information to correct case-count selection bias and measurement error.
Method targets improved instantaneous R(t) estimation under reporting variability.
Corrected-score estimators are the core contribution for confounding plus exposure measurement error.
General control-variates framework targets causal estimation with error-prone exposures.
Extends risk and survival-function estimation for outcome measurement error.
Jointly models recurrent-event and informative observation processes.
Data-assimilation paper studies epidemic inference under different observation functions.
State-space SEIR inference explicitly treats infection observation probability as latent.
Framework infers pathogen trends from composite surveillance with noisy observation and testing processes.
Hidden Markov incidence model separates latent TB incidence from the detection process.
Uses transmission dynamics to estimate reporting fractions and adjusted incidence.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-report and behavioral measurement bias assessment
reassignments.rationale: Tests whether underreported syringe sharing biases behavioral risk attribution.
Validates household-survey drug-use responses against urinalysis.

reassignments.rationale: Compares surgeon-only SSI surveillance with enhanced reference surveillance.

reassignments.rationale: Uses biomarker evidence to assess underreported alcohol use.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-report and behavioral measurement bias assessment

reassignments.rationale: Evaluates registry completeness, dose underreporting, and duplication.

reassignments.rationale: Uses participatory methods to expose social-desirability underreporting of concurrency.

reassignments.to_canonical_name: Self-report and behavioral measurement bias assessment

concerns: No slice records were assigned to multiple_system_estimation, preferential_sampling, reporting_delay_nowcasting, sentinel_surveillance_calibration, or syndromic_surveillance, so those concept-level decisions are based on allowed-concept semantics rather than slice-specific record evidence.
